job.name: 员工任职日快照
job.description: 基于员工、组织和职位当前维表生成员工任职日快照

statements.sql:
INSERT OVERWRITE paimon_fs_catalog.dwd_human_resource.bt_snap_employee_assignment_employee_day_d_overwrite_v1
SELECT
  current_date() AS snapshot_date,
  emp.employee_sk,
  emp.segment_code,
  emp.segment_name,
  emp.source_employee_id,
  emp.employee_name,
  emp.employment_status_code,
  emp.employment_status_name,
  emp.org_sk,
  emp.source_org_id,
  org.source_org_name,
  emp.position_sk,
  emp.source_position_id,
  pos.source_position_name,
  emp.entry_date,
  emp.leave_date,
  emp.src_system,
  current_timestamp() AS etl_time,
  '${run_id}' AS batch_id
FROM paimon_fs_catalog.dim_human_resource.bt_dim_employee_current_d_overwrite_v1 emp
LEFT JOIN paimon_fs_catalog.dim_human_resource.bt_dim_organization_current_d_overwrite_v1 org
  ON emp.org_sk = org.org_sk
LEFT JOIN paimon_fs_catalog.dim_human_resource.bt_dim_position_current_d_overwrite_v1 pos
  ON emp.position_sk = pos.position_sk
